data.summary: The exploratory step is inconclusive due to insufficient evidence to validate the requirement.
data.assessment: The requirement to validate 'Subscription status (active/paused/cancelled) visibility' is not directly addressed in the provided evidence. While the linked use case mentions the need for subscription status visibility, there are no specific API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this functionality. The prior steps focus on creating offers and bookings but do not provide evidence related to subscription status visibility, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence of subscription status visibility (active/paused/cancelled).

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify subscription status visibility.
